summary: 2/5 specific checks FAIL (pending fixes not yet applied). 6/8 invariants PASS. 0 regressions. 1 LOW secondary finding.

checks.evidence: build_full_context() return dict contains: tour, ogham_actif, oghams_decouverts, factions, heure_normalisee, life_essence, day, cards_played, active_promises, active_tags, player, patterns, trust, narrative, session, _hidden. No 'gauges' key present. S2-CONTEXT-GAUGES-CLEANUP confirmed applied.

checks.description: get_critical_gauges() removed — no callers remain in non-test files
checks.evidence: grep -rn 'get_critical_gauges' scripts/ addons/ → no results. Function fully removed. No dead callers detected in any production file.

checks.description: BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA-FIX applied: reputation_changed emits clamped actual_delta (new_val - old_val), not raw rep_delta
checks.evidence: Line 598: reputation_changed.emit(faction, new_val, float(rep_delta)) — emits raw rep_delta (e.g. +20) not actual_delta. BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA-FIX task is still pending (priority 6). At faction_rep=95 + rep_delta=+20: emitted delta=+20 but actual change=+5 (capped at 100). Signal consumers receive inflated delta.
checks.fix_required: Before emit: compute old_rep from pre-apply state. actual_delta = new_val - old_rep. Emit actual_delta instead of rep_delta.

checks.description: run.day increments per card in resolve_choice() (S2-DAY-TICK-FIX)
checks.evidence: Line 19: run['day'] = 1 (initialization). resolve_choice() function (line 132) has no increment of run['day']. All end-run result dicts (lines 208, 227, 244) use run.get('day', 1) which always returns 1. S2-DAY-TICK-FIX task still pending (priority 8). LLM context always shows 'Jour 1' regardless of run length.
checks.fix_required: S2-DAY-TICK-FIX: add CARDS_PER_DAY constant + increment run['day'] at resolve_choice() entry.

checks.description: faction_rep routes from meta.faction_rep (not stale run.factions)
checks.evidence: build_full_context() line ~35: 'factions': meta.get('faction_rep', {...defaults...}). Reads from meta (persistent, updated by effect engine). BUG-FACTIONS-STALE-FIX fully applied.

store_run.gd line 22: run['active_promises'] = []. Lines 307, 321: check_promise_deadlines reads/writes active_promises. merlin_effect_engine.gd lines 245, 261, 271, 288, 295, 299, 307, 311: all use active_promises. No 'promises' stale key found. BUG-PROMISE-SYSTEM-FIX confirmed applied.
Line 74: const LIFE_ESSENCE_DRAIN_PER_CARD := 0. EFFECT_CAPS['drain_per_card'] = 0 (line 356). No life drain occurs per card.

checks.description: No pacing recovery (+5HP auto-recovery) in resolve_choice()
checks.evidence: grep for 'pacing|recovery|life_essence.*+|life.*recover|+5' in resolve_choice → no results. Director q-20260412-005 fully applied. Survival is choice-driven only.

secondary_findings.description: Vestigial gauges_changed signal + StoreMap.update_gauges still present in merlin_store.gd. Signal declared at line 23, emitted at line 434 via StoreMap.update_gauges. get_map_gauges() reads map_progression.gauges at lines 662-666. This is map/progression gauge system (separate from card-cycle context gauges). Not a regression — no cross-context impact. Clean-up optional.
secondary_findings.recommendation: If MerlinGaugeSystem + StoreMap are otherwise alive, this is benign. If they are dead code, add to S2-DEAD-FILES scope.

regression_checks.note: S4-SMOKE-TEST PAT-023 confirmed. No new code touched this path.

regression_checks.description: BUG-FACTIONS-STALE-FIX: all 5 AI subsystems read meta.faction_rep
regression_checks.note: context_builder confirmed meta.faction_rep. S3-FACTION-REGRESSION-TEST covered rag_manager + llm_adapter + omniscient + event_selector. No regressions introduced by GAUGES-CLEANUP.
CHK-6 confirms. No new code touched effect_engine or store_run promises.
CHK-7 + CHK-8 confirm. No regressions in merlin_constants or store_run.

regression_checks.description: get_critical_gauges fully removed — no ParseError risk from dead callers
regression_checks.note: CHK-2 confirms. test_context_builder.gd also cleaned (PAT-026 applied in cycle 15).

verdict_rationale: PARTIAL_PASS: S2-CONTEXT-GAUGES-CLEANUP is fully verified (CHK-1 + CHK-2 PASS). All 5 prior regressions confirmed intact. The 2 failing checks (CHK-3, CHK-4) are not regressions — they are known pending tasks (BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA-FIX P6, S2-DAY-TICK-FIX P8) not yet executed. No new bugs introduced. System is stable for next dev cycle to fix CHK-3 and CHK-4.
